task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or home screen is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login (ideally showing the user profile for arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the correct complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case titled 'Unauthorized Network Access - Incident Report IR-2024-3391' is visible on the screen, either in a search result being clicked or fully opened in the case viewer.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the tasks section of the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Tasks' tab or section within the 'Unauthorized Network Access' case is active and displaying a list of tasks.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the specific task to be updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task titled 'Review Supporting Documentation for Evidence' is visible, selected, or opened in a detailed view.

task_completion.description: Verify the task status was updated to CLOSED or Completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicator or dropdown for the task 'Review Supporting Documentation for Evidence' explicitly shows 'CLOSED' or 'Completed', and ideally a save or confirmation action is visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with ArkCase.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible navigating to https://localhost:9443/arkcase/, rather than terminal windows executing API or curl commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a standard web application UI for ArkCase, not a local text editor, static HTML file, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the status update was performed using standard UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The status change is done via standard application buttons, dropdowns, or forms, without the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) being open to manipulate the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target case title is exactly 'Unauthorized Network Access - Incident Report IR-2024-3391'. The target task title is exactly 'Review Supporting Documentation for Evidence'. The expected login username is 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com'. The final required state for the task is 'CLOSED' or 'Completed'.
